Class PropertySourceBootstrapProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.bootstrap.config.PropertySourceBootstrapProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.config") public class PropertySourceBootstrapProperties extends Object
Properties for Spring Cloud Config bootstrap.
Author:
Dave Syer
